name: IHG One Rewards Premier Business Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 140,000 points after $4,000 in 3 months + 60,000 points after $9,000 in 6 months = up to 200,000 total points

earning_rates.notes: 10X points per $1 at IHG properties. Additional IHG base points + Platinum Elite bonus earned separately via IHG membership.

hotel_status.notes: Automatic Platinum Elite status as long as card is open

other_benefits.name: Fourth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Receive a fourth reward night free when redeeming 3+ consecutive award nights at IHG properties

other_benefits.name: Elite Bonus
other_benefits.description: 60% bonus on IHG base earning at hotels (Platinum Elite level)

sources.notes: One Mile at a Time review

recurring_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
recurring_credits.description: Annual Free Night Award at eligible IHG Hotels & Resorts worldwide; up to 40,000-point cap (can add own points for higher categories).

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee, every 4 years.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.
